findings.description: The knowledge file changed the variable type from `String` to `Boolean` in the `allow001()` method body. The source reads `String allow001 = (Boolean) params.get("allow001");` but the knowledge file renders it as `Boolean allow001 = (Boolean) params.get("allow001");`. Even though the source code appears to contain a typo, the knowledge file must faithfully reproduce the source and not silently correct it.
findings.source_evidence: Source: `String allow001 = (Boolean) params.get("allow001");` / Knowledge file: `Boolean allow001 = (Boolean) params.get("allow001");`

findings.description: The source intro states that when reusing an existing annotation and only changing validator behavior, only steps 2 and 3 (バリデータの作成 and バリデータを設定ファイルに登録) are required. This decision-guiding note is absent from the knowledge file.
findings.source_evidence: 「また、既存のアノテーションをそのまま使用して、バリデータの処理内容を変更する場合は、上記手順の2と3を実施すればよい。」

findings.description: `getMessage` (the ValidationContext method used to obtain a Message for the option parameter) and `Message` (the return type) appear prominently in the source and the s2 body, but are absent from s2's hints array.
findings.source_evidence: Source: `context.getMessage メソッドで取得した Message をオプションパラメータとして設定しておく` / Code: `context.getMessage(propertyMessageId)`
